Voixa AI SEO Tool - Rank First in AI & Voice Search
Optimize your website for AI and voice search! Get free traffic from AI-search platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Siri & Alexa.

Optimize for AI & Voice Search – Boost Traffic with Voixa (AEO Tool)

Voixa is a free Chrome extension that helps your website rank higher in AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Siri, Alexa, and Google Assistant. Using advanced AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategies, Voixa helps SEO specialists, content creators, and webmasters get discovered in voice search and AI-powered results.

Why Voixa?
Traditional SEO is no longer enough. AI-driven platforms prioritize clear, structured, and conversational content. Voixa helps you adapt by offering actionable insights and tools designed for voice search SEO and AI search optimization.

Key Features:
✔  Voice Search Score – Get a percentage-based score indicating how well your page is optimized for AEO.
✔  Speakable Tag Analysis – Detects and verifies Google’s Speakable structured data for better AI indexing.
✔  Content Structure Analysis – Ensures proper use of H1, H2, H3 tags and organizes content for optimal voice search ranking.
✔  FAQ Detection – Identifies Q&A sections, improving Google voice search SEO and answer engine optimization (AEO).
✔  Keyword Analysis – Finds long-tail keywords that match voice search queries for improved discoverability.
✔  Content Length Analysis – Checks if your content meets best SEO strategies for voice search.
✔  PDF Report Export – Download a full AEO audit report with actionable recommendations.

Why Optimize for AI & Voice Search?  

With the rise of AI search platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, DeepSeek, Siri, and Alexa, SEO is evolving beyond traditional rankings. Voice SEO optimization tools are essential because:
✔ Users search differently when speaking - using conversational, long-tail queries.
✔ AI prioritizes structured data, fast-loading pages, and answer-focused content.
✔ AEO vs traditional SEO: AI-driven search results require specialized optimization strategies.
Voixa ensures your website ranks higher by following best practices for structured data, page speed, and content formatting, making it more discoverable for both traditional SEO and AEO driven search results.

Perfect for:
- SEO specialists  
- Content creators  
- Bloggers & webmasters  
- Digital marketers  

How It Works:
1 Click "Optimize" to scan your page.
2 Get Insights: Gain professional insights enhanced with AI for accurate recommendations.
3 Download a structured data for voice search report (PDF) for future improvements
4 Apply Changes: Implement expert-backed suggestions to elevate your voice search ranking.

Data Persistence – Your analysis results remain saved even if you accidentally close the extension.  

Start using Voixa – your Voice SEO & AEO assistant for the AI-powered web.

Stop juggling messy spreadsheets. The GigHQ.ai Chrome extension is your AI-powered copilot for the job hunt.

Stop applying in the dark. Turn your browser into a powerful AI job search engine.

GigHQ.ai is the definitive candidate-to-job matching engine designed to replace messy spreadsheets with clarity and strategy. Whether you are browsing LinkedIn or other job boards, GigHQ acts as your sidekick, instantly analyzing opportunities to tell you not just what the job is, but if you can win it.

🚀 KEY FEATURES:

1. AI Candidate Match Score 🎯 Don't waste time on applications that won’t get read. Our AI instantly analyzes your profile against the job description to give you a "Match Score." Know exactly where you stand before you click apply.

2. OutreachAgent: Find Hiring Managers Instantly 🕵️‍♂️ Stop sending applications into a black hole.
* Identify Stakeholders: We automatically identify the hiring team and key decision-makers for the role.
* Draft Messages: Generate personalized, AI-written connection requests and messages tailored to the specific recruiter and job.

3. Deep Market Intelligence 📊 Get the data employers don't show you. View real-time insights on:
* Company growth and revenue trends.
* Recent layoffs and hiring velocity.
* Application volume analysis.

4. One-Click Application Tracking 📌 Never update a spreadsheet again. Bookmark jobs instantly from your browser. We capture the company, role, and details, organizing them into your GigHQ dashboard automatically.

5. Seamless Integration 🔗 Works directly on top of the job sites you use every day, streamlining your workflow without interrupting your search.

🌟 WHY GIGHQ? The job market is a black box. We open it up. By combining automated tracking with proprietary outcome data, we help career starters, advancers, and switchers focus on the roles they are most likely to land.

👇 SUPERCHARGE YOUR SEARCH The extension connects seamlessly with our full suite of free tools:

ResumeRank: Optimize your CV for the ATS.
CoverGenius: Write cover letters that convert.
CareerCompass: Navigate your next career move.

Get the GigHQ.ai extension today and land your next gig faster. Learn more at www.gighq.ai

By downloading this extension, you agree to our Terms of Service (https://www.gighq.ai/terms-of-service/) and Privacy Policy (https://www.gighq.ai/privacy-policy/). Need help? Reach out anytime at help@nextgig.xyz

iFinder, a Web search assistant to enhance your search efficiency.

Finding information online taking too much time and effort? Try iFinder, the browser highlighting extension! It automatically highlights the keywords you're looking for, helping you find information faster.

Feature list
1. Auto Highlights!
Based on your search content, iFinder intelligently generates and highlights keywords without the need for manual input. Works great with Google search.
2. Powerful & Flexible
The most powerful search extension on the web! Without altering your browser's default search functionality, it adds features like automatic highlighting, multi-keyword support, matched keyword positioning, case matching, and whole-word matching.
3. 100% Private
No user data is collected, and all data is stored locally. There's no need to worry about privacy and security.
4. Keyboard Shortcuts
Supports keyboard shortcuts for easier and more convenient operation.

Bidirectional Translation – Seamlessly translate between Bahasa Indonesia and English.
Word Limit Control – Set reply length from 1–300 words to match platform requirements.
Instant Integration – Works directly on your favorite platforms like Upwork, Fiverr, LinkedIn, and more.

💡 Perfect For:
Freelancers, agencies, customer support teams, and professionals who need to save time while maintaining high-quality client communication.  With M5 Chat, you can stop worrying about language barriers or crafting the perfect message — and focus on delivering great work.
Track your expenses directly from your browser

Receiptix — Receipt Scanner & Expense Tracker for Your Browser

You just paid for something online. The confirmation page is right there. Hit ⌘+Shift+E (Mac) or Alt+Shift+E (Windows), drag over the receipt, and it's captured — amount, date, merchant, category, all extracted automatically.

No copying, no screenshots saved to random folders, no "I'll organize this later" that never happens.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Install the extension and sign in with Google
2. When you see a receipt on any website, press the shortcut or click the extension icon
3. Select the area to capture — Receiptix reads and categorizes the receipt automatically
4. Your receipts sync to the Receiptix mobile app for reports, analytics, and on-the-go access

You can also drag and drop receipt images or PDFs directly into the sidebar, or right-click selected text and choose "Save as Receipt."

ORGANIZE BY PROJECT

Group expenses into projects — useful for separating work trips, client billing, or shared household budgets. Select a project from the sidebar dropdown before capturing, and receipts go straight to the right place. Projects sync across the extension and mobile app, so everyone on a shared project sees the same data.

WHAT THE EXTENSION DOES

- Captures receipts from any webpage with a keyboard shortcut or screenshot tool
- Extracts receipt details (amount, date, merchant, category) using AI
- Categorizes expenses automatically for spending reports
- Supports JPEG, PNG, WEBP, and PDF uploads (up to 10MB)
- Works with Google sign-in — no separate account needed

THE FULL RECEIPTIX APP

The Chrome extension is one piece of a larger expense tracking system. The Receiptix mobile app (iOS and Android) gives you the complete picture:

- AI receipt scanning from your phone's camera — snap a photo of any paper or digital receipt and get merchant name, date, totals, and individual line items extracted automatically
- Voice mode for logging expenses hands-free — just say what you spent and Receiptix records and categorizes it
- Smart categorization that learns your spending patterns over time
- Charts and reports that break down your spending by category, time period, and project
- Shared projects with per-member breakdowns for group expenses — trips, renovations, team budgets
- Multi-currency support with automatic conversions for travelers
- Apple Watch app and Telegram bot for quick expense entry
- Cloud sync across all your devices

Whether the receipt is on a screen or in your hand, it ends up in the same place.

FREE VS. PREMIUM

The free tier includes manual expense entry, basic categorization, visual reports, multi-currency support, and cloud sync. Premium adds AI scanning, voice tracking, advanced analytics, and unlimited storage. Subscribe through the mobile app.

LINKS

- Mobile app: https://get.receiptix.io
- Website: https://receiptix.io
- Support: support@receiptix.io

Download the SkillSync extension today and take the first step towards a smarter, more efficient job hunt. Make your job applications stand out with SkillSync Copilot, your personal Al job assistant.

SkillSync allows you to analyze job listings on LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor and rate your competency against them based on your SkillSync profile and your resume. SkillSync also allows you to generate, edit, and download cover letters based on your profile, tailored to the job description.

On job application pages, SkillSync helps you autofill information, using information on your SkillSync profile. SkillSync can auto upload resumes, help you answer open-ended application questions using a list of relevant experiences you enter into the app.

But that's not all! Want to ensure the email feels like you? With Mighty, you can modify the length of your email to suit your preference and even train the program on your personal writing style. IELTS Writing in Google Docs by Scribo

Get ready for your IELTS writing test with Scribo, the must-have tool for students determined to elevate their English writing skills. Trusted by some of the most rigorous educational systems worldwide, Scribo’s intuitive AI helps you practice and perfect your writing, giving you the edge you need to excel in your English writing test.

Scribo provides you with personalized feedback on your writing and gives you an indicative score based on the same rubrics used in the exam, helping you see how your work measures up against the standard. Instantly identify areas of strength and weakness—whether it's grammar, structure, or argumentation—and receive tailored suggestions to improve your essays.

Writing is widely recognized as one of the most challenging parts of the IELTS exam. With Scribo, you can track your progress over time and watch your score grow by focusing on specific writing goals, and fine-tuning your skills to confidently face the exam. Join the community of students using Scribo to make exam preparation easier and more effective, one essay at a time.

GPT Context - Use ChatGPT To Chat With Any Webpages
GPT Context – A ChatGPT Chrome Extension

GPT Context is a ChatGPT Chrome extension that seamlessly integrates ChatGPT into your browser. Chat with any websites, summarize articles, brainstorm ideas, improve writing, and get instant AI assistance—all without switching tabs!

🚀 Designed for students, professionals, content creators, and researchers, GPT Context helps you draft, edit, summarize, translate, and analyze content effortlessly. Plus, it works with PDFs and documents opened in Chrome, making it a must-have productivity tool.

✨ Key Features:
✅ Chat with any webpage – Get AI-powered insights instantly by asking any questions about the website
✅ One-click ChatGPT tools to perform most command tasks – Summarize, Improve, Grammar Check, Translate & more.
✅ Instant writing, editing & research support – Save time & boost efficiency.
✅ Works with PDFs & documents – Enhance productivity in your workflow.
✅ Seamless & fast – No need to copy-paste, just activate and go!

📌 How to Use GPT Context:
1️⃣ Visit the Chrome Web Store
2️⃣ Search for "GPT Context"
3️⃣ Click “Add to Chrome” to install
4️⃣ Open any website or document in Chrome

7️⃣ Enjoy the AI-powered assistant without leaving your tab!

Calfrenzy - Free Online Appointment Scheduling Software
Schedule 1-to-1 or group meetings directly from your browser. Manage and share booking links instantly with a single click.

Calfrenzy is a free meeting scheduler and booking page tool that lets clients book time with you without the back-and-forth. This Chrome extension puts your booking pages one click away — wherever you're already working.

Reply to a prospect in Gmail, follow up on LinkedIn, or paste a link into a doc — your booking page is right there in the toolbar. Pick the page, insert the link, send.

What you can do
⮕ Insert booking links in Gmail — Add your booking link to any email or reply without switching tabs.
⮕ Share on LinkedIn — Drop your link into LinkedIn messages and InMail so prospects can book a call instantly.
⮕ One-click access to every booking page — All your booking pages live in the extension popup. Pick the right one for the conversation.
⮕ Copy any link instantly — One click copies a booking URL to your clipboard, ready to paste anywhere.
⮕ Quick dashboard access — Jump to your Calfrenzy dashboard to edit availability, check upcoming bookings, or adjust a page.
⮕ Works across the web — Use it in Gmail, LinkedIn, Microsoft Edge sites, and anywhere else you talk to clients.

Free forever. No credit card required. 

Get started in two minutes
1. Install the extension.
2. Sign in with Google or your Calfrenzy email.
3. Share your first link from the next email you send.

Don't have an account yet? Sign up free at calfrenzy.com.

Free Text Expander & Snippet Manager for Zendesk, Gmail & Chrome

Quick Expand is a fast, privacy-friendly text expander for Chrome. Save your most common replies as snippets and insert them anywhere – in Zendesk, Gmail, helpdesks, forms, or any website – using either keyboard shortcuts or a searchable snippet library.

Stop re-typing the same responses and start focusing on the actual conversation.

🚀 Key Features:

• Two ways to insert:
Use shortcuts like /refund directly in the text field or click a snippet from the popup. Both options work together so you are not forced to memorise dozens of hotkeys.

• Built for hundreds of snippets: 
Scroll, search, and filter through a clean snippet library designed for large collections of replies, templates, and code blocks.

• Zendesk-friendly, works (almost) everywhere:
Carefully tuned to work inside Zendesk ticket replies while still working in Gmail, Help Scout, Intercom, GitHub comments, forms, and almost any other text area in Chrome.

• Local and privacy-focused:
Snippets are stored securely on your device. No accounts, no cloud storage, no data collection.

• Rich content support: 
Store phrases, full emails, replies, and code blocks. Use formatting like bold, italics, lists, and links where supported.

• Backup and restore:
Export your snippets to a JSON file and import them on another machine to keep your setup in sync.

✅ Who Quick Expand is for

•  Customer support teams handling similar tickets all day
•  Power users and founders answering repetitive emails
•  Anyone who needs fast access to hundreds of reusable snippets without having to remember every shortcut

Tailored for customer support teams and power users who handle large volumes of repetitive replies and need fast access to hundreds of snippets without having to remember every shortcut.

🔧 Actively developed

Quick Expand is an actively developed indie project. If you spot a bug or need a feature, you can reach out via the support page – feedback directly shapes what comes next.

🆕 What’s new in recent versions (0.6.3)

•  Added /shortcut-style expansion directly in text fields
•  Improved behaviour in complex editors like Zendesk
•  General stability and UI polish
•  Added optional cloud Sync via Google Drive. 

Install Quick Expand today and make repetitive replies a one-click (or one-shortcut) job.
FavText is Research Made Easy chrome extension. With FavText, you can bookmark your favourite text on the Internet. This could be…

FavText is Research Made Easy chrome extension. With FavText, you can bookmark your favourite text on the Internet. This could be on a web site or in a social media handle. As long as this line is publicly visible you can bookmark it.

The bookmark remembers the text, the URL, and has additional attributes as Line name, Author name, metadata and categories for easy search, referencing and collaboration. Using these attributes you can set an easy to record, access, download or share your records.

You can add more context to your bookmarks with these parameters.
Line Name: Can put 1-3 word title to remember this line. Basically, summarize your note or bookmark.
Author Name: Give credit to the author.
Category: There are hundreds of public categories. Enter a letter and autocomplete shows categories. Select what you need. Else, enter your own category name. This would be remembered and shown in future FavTexts. You can customize these categories for subject-based indexing or collaboration.
Metadata: Select from  auto-metadata suggestions or enter your comma separated list of metadata.

Suggested Use Cases
Bookmark any line or para you read on the Internet. Build your own quotes library, tips gallery or track subscriptions.
Perform Structured Research. When writing a blog, working on a detailed presentation or research, you can create own category and save hundreds, and even thousands of bookmarks. Later use these records for bibliography management or reference tracking.
Collaboration. You can define a common category and share in a group of users. All bookmarks saved by all users in the group are accessible to all members. 

Start intelligent bookmarking today.
